allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const src = fs.readFileSync\('src/App.js','utf8'\); const lines = src.split\('\\n'\).length; console.log\('Lines:', lines\); const hasLight = src.includes\('cardShadow:\\"9px 9px'\); const hasDark = src.includes\('cardShadow:\\"0 2px 12px'\); const hasSidebar = src.includes\('Plus Jakarta Sans'\); const hasGlobalFloat = src.includes\('@keyframes float'\); console.log\({hasLightNeu: hasLight, hasDarkFallback: hasDark, hasPlusJakarta: hasSidebar, hasFloat: hasGlobalFloat}\);")
